market_snapshot.market_note: Total compressed from wider 221.5 consensus into Kalshi 220.5; OKC team total available at elevated 115.5 plus-money, while SAS TT increased to 108.5 after Fox ruled out.

DeAaron Fox.impact: Primary Spurs guard creation removed. Dylan Harper starts at PG. Usage redistribution expected to Harper, Castle, Vassell, Wembanyama, and Keldon Johnson. Spurs half-court shot quality downgraded; transition/secondary creation volatility increased.

Luke Kornet.impact: Backup big availability partially stabilizes Wembanyama non-C minutes, but full-strength assumption is not allowed. If limited, Plumlee/Olynyk emergency-minute pathways become relevant.

Jalen Williams.impact: OKC half-court creation and wing defensive stability restored. Ajay Mitchell usage/minute compression risk increases.

edge_board.stake_guidance: $2.00-$3.00 micro-unit only; avoid if price drops below +100

edge_board.edge: strongest derivative after Fox ruled out, but price is taxed
edge_board.stake_guidance: $3.00-$4.00 if accepted; best if -115 or better appears

edge_board.edge: thin/no-play at taxed price after Fox out
edge_board.stake_guidance: No pregame add; reserve for LiveFlow only

edge_board.edge: directional lean OKC, price reduces value
edge_board.stake_guidance: Lean only; better used live if OKC starts slow or price improves

Stephon Castle_over_16_5_points.edge: Fox out increases handling/shot volume; remains best Daft tail

Devin Vassell_over_11_5_points.edge: Playable only as small single; avoid heavy Castle+Vassell cluster exposure

Ajay_Mitchell_under_13_5_points.edge: Jalen Williams return compresses Ajay usage; OKC blowout path creates late-minute volatility

liveflow_plan.risk_cluster_lock: max two correlated positions per segment
triggers: If OKC rim pressure + FTA rate appears immediately, OKC TT over remains live.
If SAS half-court stalls without Fox and Harper/Castle pressure is forced into late clock, target SAS TT under live.
If Wembanyama foul trouble appears, downgrade SAS cover and upgrade OKC spread/TT.
If OKC starts cold from three but gets paint touches, avoid panic under; look for rebound over/live TT buy points.

notes: Patch reflects Fox ruled out, Kornet probable but not full strength, SGA MVP ceremony motivational environment, Wembanyama/SGA narrative tension, and Chet/Wemby rivalry volatility. Fourth regular-season matchup excluded from matchup weighting per user due to non-starter involvement.
